nodes.label: ProductCondition
nodes.description: Covers all battery lifetime relevant properties.

nodes.label: informationOnAccidents
nodes.description:
The battery passport must contain information and data resulting from its use such as accidents. 

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.8.4

nodes.label: lastUpdate
nodes.description:
Timestamp for dynamic data attributes show the last update time.

   Defined time within a time range, measured from the start time of the time range.

nodes.label: energyThroughput
nodes.description:
The data attribute should be reported as measured for further potential processing. In addition, the normalisation by capacity may add a further useful value that ensures comparability among battery sizes.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.6.7

nodes.label: energyThroughputValue
nodes.description: Overall sum of the energy throughput over the battery lifetime (data attribute should be reported as measured for further potential processing. In addition, the normalisation by usable battery energy could add a further useful value that ensures comparability among battery sizes).

nodes.label: capacityThroughput
nodes.description:
The data attribute should be reported as measured for further potential processing. In addition, the normalisation by capacity may add a further useful value that ensures comparability among battery sizes.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.6.8

nodes.label: capacityThroughputValue
nodes.description: Overall sum of the capacity throughput over the battery lifetime (data attribute should be reported as measured for further potential processing. In addition, the normalisation by capacity could add a further useful value that ensures comparability among battery sizes).

nodes.label: numberOfFullCycles
nodes.description:
Number of (full) charging and discharging cycles.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.6.4

nodes.label: numberOfFullCyclesValue
nodes.description: Total count of times a battery has been fully charged from empty to full capacity and then fully discharged, used as an indicator of the battery's usage and lifespan.

nodes.label: stateOfCertifiedEnergy
nodes.description:
Definition based on UNECE GTR 22: The measured or on-board UBE performance at a specific point in its lifetime, expressed as a percentage of the certified usable battery energy.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.2.7

nodes.label: stateOfCertifiedEnergyValue
nodes.description: Measured or on-board UBE performance at a specific point in its lifetime, expressed as a percentage of the certified usable battery energy.

nodes.label: remainingEnergy
nodes.description:
Definition from UNECE GTR 22, applicable only to EVs.
The energy supplied by the battery from the beginning of the test procedure used for certification until the applicable break-off criterion of the test procedure used for certification is reached.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.2.6

nodes.label: remainingEnergyValue
nodes.description: UBE determined at the present point in the lifetime of the vehicle by the test procedure used for certification.

nodes.label: remainingCapacity
nodes.description:
The in-use data attribute on capacity, corresponding with the definition of rated capacity.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.2.3

nodes.label: remainingCapacityValue
nodes.description: In-use data attribute on capacity, corresponding with the definition of rated capacity.

nodes.label: negativeEvents
nodes.description:
The battery passport must contain information and data resulting from its use such as accidents. 

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.8.4

nodes.label: negativeEventValue
nodes.description: Negative event, such as an accident. No further definition provided by regulation.

nodes.label: temperatureInformation
nodes.description:
The battery passport must include periodically recorded information on the operating environmental conditions, including temperature.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.7.5 - 8

nodes.label: measuredTemp
nodes.description: Temperature measured in degree Celsius.

nodes.label: timeExtremeHighTemp
nodes.description: Cumulated time spent above the given upper boundary of temperature.

nodes.label: timeExtremeLowTemp
nodes.description: Cumulated time spent below the given lower boundary of temperature.

nodes.label: timeExtremeHighTempCharging
nodes.description: Cumulated time spent above the given upper boundary of temperature during Charging.

nodes.label: timeExtremeLowTempCharging
nodes.description: Cumulated time spent below the given lower boundary of temperature during charging.

nodes.label: remainingPowerCapability
nodes.description:
Original power capability (in Watts) and limits, with temperature range when relevant.
- The amount of energy that a battery is capable to provide over a given period of time under reference conditions.
- Power capability at 80% and 20% state of charge.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.3.3

nodes.label: remainingPowerCapabilityValue
nodes.description: Remaining power capability value.

nodes.label: atSoC
nodes.description: Available capacity in a battery expressed as a percentage of remaining capacity.

nodes.label: powerCapabilityAt
nodes.description: Defined by 'pre-use power capability (definition of power capability as given in Battery Regulation.

nodes.label: rPCLastUpdated
nodes.description: RPC last updated.

nodes.label: evolutionOfSelfDischarge
nodes.description:
Evolution of self-discharge rates is the change of self-discharge over time and usage, as percentage calculated from the initial and current self-discharge rate.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.4.8

nodes.label: evolutionOfSelfDischargeValue
nodes.description: Total count of times a battery has been fully charged from empty to full capacity and then fully discharged, used as an indicator of the battery's usage and lifespan.

nodes.label: currentSelfDischargingRate
nodes.description:
The current self-discharge rate is the change of the self-discharge rate in an idle state of the battery in reference conditions (temperature etc.) at aging parameter x, e.g. after a certain amount of storage time or, number of cycles.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.4.7

nodes.label: currentSelfDischargingRateValue
nodes.description: Current self-discharge in % of capacity per unit of time in defined conditions (temperature range) during the use phase.

nodes.label: stateOfCharge
nodes.description:
Available capacity in a battery expressed as a percentage of remaining capacity.  

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.2.8 (changed: available energy or charge in a battery expressed as a percentage of rated capacity as declared by the manufacturer, or, when the battery’s state of health is no longer equal to its initial condition, of the maximum energy or charge that can be stored in the battery at the time of charging)

nodes.label: stateOfChargeValue
nodes.description: Available capacity in a battery expressed as a percentage of remaining capacity.

nodes.label: remainingRoundTripEnergyEfficiency
nodes.description:
The battery passport shall include information, where possible, about the remaining round trip energy efficiency as information on the state of health of the battery 

The update frequency of remaining round trip energy efficiency should be aligned with the update frequency of round trip energy efficiency fade and should be provided upon change of the battery status.

DIN DKE Spec 99100 chapter reference: 6.7.4.4

nodes.label: remainingRoundTripEnergyEfficiencyValue
nodes.preferredName: remaining round trip energy efficiency value
nodes.description: Percentage of energy that can be recovered and used after a full charge and discharge cycle, reflecting the battery's ability to retain and return energy efficiently over time.

nodes.label: CapacityThroughput
nodes.description: Capacity throughput.

nodes.label: NumberOfFullCycles
nodes.description: - Information and data as a result of its use, including the number of charging and discharging cycles.

nodes.label: EnergyThroughputEntity
nodes.description: Energy throughput, last update.

nodes.label: CapacityThroughputEntity
nodes.description: Capacity throughput, last update.

nodes.label: NumberOfFullCyclesEntity
nodes.description: Number of full cycles, last update.

nodes.label: StateOfCertifiedEnergyEntity
nodes.description: State of certified energy, last update.

nodes.label: RemainingEnergyEntity
nodes.description: Remaining energy, last update.

nodes.label: RemainingCapacityEntity
nodes.description: Remaining capacity, last update.

nodes.label: NegativeEvent
nodes.description: Negative event, last update.

nodes.label: TemperatureConditionsEntity
nodes.description: Temperature conditions, last update.

nodes.label: RemainingPowerCapabilityEntity
nodes.description: Remaining power capability, last update.

nodes.label: RemainingPowerCapabilityDynamicAt
nodes.description: Remaining power capability dynamic at.

nodes.label: PowerCapabilityAtEntity
nodes.description: Power capability at.

nodes.label: EvolutionOfSelfDischargeEntity
nodes.description: Evolution of self discharge, last update.

nodes.label: CurrentSelfDischargingRateEntity
nodes.description: Current self discharging rate.

nodes.label: StateOfChargeEntity
nodes.description: State of charge.

nodes.label: RemainingRoundTripEnergyEfficiencyEntity
nodes.description: Remaining round trip energy efficiency.
